name: Zucchini in Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and cook for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally until fragrant.
3. Add the tomatoes to the skillet. Stir and bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce the heat to low and simmer the sauce slowly for 20-25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in the salt, sugar, pepper, and tomato paste. Simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Gently add the zucchini to the skillet, spreading them evenly so they cook through but remain tender (about 15 minutes).
7. Remove from heat, stir in the chopped basil, and allow it to cool completely.
8. Serve cold.
Serves 6
